case_title: LI, YINGHONG VS ATLAS TOWING SERVICES INC. AGT/ YEBRA RAFAEL

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LI, YINGHONG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ATLAS TOWING SERVICES INC. AGT/ YEBRA RAFAEL PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ATLAS TOWING SERVICES INC. AGT/ YEBRA RAFAEL
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUN-05-2001, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LI, YINGHONG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ATLAS TOWING SERVICES INC. AGT/ YEBRA RAFAEL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
